title: Williams-Sonoma: A Deep Bargain You Won't Want To Miss

title: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. declares quarterly cash dividend
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.90 per common share. The dividend is payable on August 25, 2023, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on July 21, 2023. ABOUT WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC.
